label: Robotics & embodied AI

node.label: Robotics & embodied AI
node.definition: Robotics and embodied-AI systems connect perception, state estimation, planning, control, learning, safety, and physical actuation in a feedback loop.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Robotics & embodied AI is modeled as depending on World-model rollout & imagination, Model-predictive control and feeding downstream nodes such as Autonomous vehicles, drones & navigation.
examples: atlas downstream link to Autonomous vehicles, drones & navigation
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include World-model rollout & imagination, Model-predictive control.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Robotics & embodied AI has an `applies` dependency on World-model rollout & imagination with `common` strength.
Robotics & embodied AI integrates Model-predictive control as part of an end-to-end application boundary.

In this atlas graph, Robotics & embodied AI has an `applies` dependency on Vision–language–action models with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, Robotics & embodied AI has an `applies` dependency on Domain randomization & simulation curricula with `optional` strength.

sentence_units.text: Robotics and embodied-AI systems connect perception, state estimation, planning, control, learning, safety, and physical actuation in a feedback loop.

In this atlas graph, Robotics & embodied AI is modeled as depending on World-model rollout & imagination, Model-predictive control and feeding downstream nodes such as Autonomous vehicles, drones & navigation.
